content_fingerprint: deepseek v4 promises million token context windows built for agentic workflows hugging face has published a community guide covering deepseek v4 s extended context capability positioning it as a practical tool for agents that need to process and reason over very large inputs hugging face has featured a community authored deep dive on deepseek v4 a model variant engineered to handle context windows up to one million tokens a scale that typically exceeds what most production systems can reliably serve the article frames the capability as a response to the growing demands of agent based pipelines
